# 402-indexer

> Nostr-native crawler that discovers L402 and x402 paid APIs across the web and publishes kind 31402 events for decentralised service discovery. Feeds the 402.pub directory and 402-mcp (AI agent client).

GitHub: https://github.com/forgesworn/402-indexer

## What it does

The indexer finds paid APIs through multiple discovery channels and announces them on Nostr so clients like 402-mcp and the 402.pub directory can discover them automatically. Services are health-checked daily; unreachable endpoints are marked stale and eventually delisted.

## Discovery channels

- **Active prober** -- HTTP probe for `WWW-Authenticate: L402`, `402 Payment Required`, IETF Payment headers, x402 well-known paths, and HTML meta tags
- **Nostr aggregator** -- Subscribe to existing kind 31402 events across relays
- **GitHub scanner** -- Search GitHub for repos using L402/x402 patterns
- **npm scanner** -- Find packages depending on toll-booth, aperture, and other L402 libraries
- **Registry scanner** -- Fetch from Satring, awesome-L402, x402.org, awesome-cashu, and cashumints.space
- **Community listener** -- Accept kind 1402 suggestion events from users

## Detection methods

The active prober recognises these signals:
- `status-402` -- HTTP 402 Payment Required status code
- `ietf-payment` -- IETF Payment authentication headers (draft-ryan-httpauth-payment-01)
- `cors-headers` -- CORS headers exposing payment information
- `well-known-l402` -- /.well-known/l402 endpoint
- `well-known-x402` -- /.well-known/x402 endpoint
- `payment-headers` -- X-Payment or similar custom headers
- `html-meta` -- HTML meta tags indicating payment support
- `link-header` -- HTTP Link headers pointing to payment resources
- `api-path-probe` -- Known API path patterns returning 402

## Health lifecycle

- **active** -- Endpoint responding and accepting payments
- **stale** -- 3+ consecutive probe failures
- **unreachable** -- 7+ consecutive failures
- Delisted after 30+ days unreachable (NIP-09 deletion event published)

## Payment rails recognised

- `l402` -- Lightning L402 (macaroon + preimage)
- `x402` -- On-chain stablecoin payments (Coinbase protocol)
- `cashu` -- Cashu ecash tokens
- `xcashu` -- Extended Cashu protocol
- `payment` -- IETF Payment (draft-ryan-httpauth-payment-01)

## Configuration

Environment variables:
- `INDEXER_SECRET_KEY` (required) -- 64-char hex Nostr secret key
- `GITHUB_TOKEN` (optional) -- GitHub API token for scanner
- `HEALTH_STATE_PATH` (optional) -- Path to health state JSON file

Relay and seed URL configuration via JSON files in `config/`.

## Part of the 402 ecosystem

- **toll-booth** -- L402 middleware (gate any API behind Lightning)
- **402-announce** -- Publish kind 31402 service announcements
- **402-mcp** -- AI agents discover, pay for, and consume 402 APIs
- **402.pub** -- Live service directory
- **402-indexer** -- Crawl and index paid APIs (this package)
